title: Ability to set custom labels on remotely cached layers
body: Right now `--cache-to` pushes the layers to an external repo as is without any additional information about them. It would be nice if we could set labels on the cached layers to distinguish them from the final container image. In case of quay, we could set the `quay.expires-after` label that would allow us the retention of old layers.

comments.body: @skateman Thanks for creating the issue additional `--layer-label` should add support for this.
